listings.name: CriticalPath Engineering
listings.description: MEP engineering firm specializing in mission-critical datacenter design. Expertise in Tier III/IV power architectures, liquid cooling systems, and facility monitoring.

listings.name: Hyperscale Design Group
listings.description: Full-service datacenter engineering consultancy. From concept through commissioning — power distribution, thermal management, and structured cabling.

listings.name: TitanPower Systems
listings.description: Manufacturer of modular UPS systems, static transfer switches, and power distribution units for enterprise and hyperscale datacenters.

listings.name: ArcticFlow Technologies
listings.description: Precision cooling solutions including rear-door heat exchangers, in-row cooling units, and direct-to-chip liquid cooling for high-density AI/GPU deployments.

listings.name: CoreBuild Infrastructure
listings.description: Licensed electrical and mechanical contractor specializing in datacenter buildouts — from bus duct installation to hot/cold aisle containment.

listings.name: Northern Rack & Cable
listings.description: Rack deployment, structured cabling, and DCIM sensor installation across Canadian colocation and enterprise datacenters.

listings.name: Marcus Holloway
listings.description: Independent manufacturers' representative covering the Southeast US. Representing 12 datacenter infrastructure brands to contractors and colo operators.

listings.name: DCX Supply
listings.description: Wholesale distribution of PDUs, rack cabinets, cable management, and power whips. Same-day shipping from East Coast warehouse.

listings.name: ThermalParts Direct
listings.description: Stocking distributor for CRAH/CRAC units, containment curtains, environmental sensors, and DCIM hardware. 15+ brands in stock.
